item.title: How to Build a REST API in Go
item.description: A practical walkthrough of building a REST API in Go using the standard library.
item.dc:creator: Quincy Larson
item.content:encoded: In this tutorial we will build a small REST API in Go.

item.title: Goroutines Explained
item.description: Understanding goroutines, channels, and concurrency primitives in Go.
item.dc:creator: Beau Carnes
item.content:encoded: Goroutines are lightweight threads managed by the Go runtime.
